chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA C.P.No.D-126 of 2024 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on office objections at flag "A". 2. For orders on maintainability of main case. ------ 08.10.2025 Mr. Liaquat Ali Shar, Additional Advocate General, Sindh a/w Imdad Ali Abro, Deputy Commissioner, Kamber-Shahdadkot and Khalid Ahmed Saraz, Deputy Secretary and Musawar Nazeer, XEN, PHED, Kamber. ------ Mr. Ahmed Hussain Shahani, advocate by affecting his appearance holds brief for Mr. Sajid Hussain Mahesar, counsel for the petitioner on the ground that the latter due to stuck in the traffic, could not reach the Court. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh files detailed report on behalf of Executive Engineer (Dev.), PHED, Kamber-Shahdadkot alongwith certain photographs, Written Statement on behalf of Deputy Commissioner, Kamber-Shahdadkot and Statement on behalf of Additional Finance Secretary (Dev.), Finance Department, Government of Sindh, taken on record. The Deputy Commissioner, Kamber-Shahdadkot submits that almost 90% physical work has been done/completed while remaining work shall be completed within two days’ time. Learned Additional Advocate General, Sindh, in terms of the compliance report, seeks disposal of the petitioner. Counsel holding brief is also of the same view. Before parting with the order, it will be appropriate to reproduce the contents of the compliance report submitted by Executive Engineer (Dev.), PHED, Kamber-Shahdadkot, which reads as under: “With reference to CP referred above, and directions received from the Honourable Court, it is respectfully submitted that the work for providing water supply facility through RO plant in village Junani Taluka Warah, is in completion phase.

Counsel holding brief is also of the same view. Before parting with the order, it will be appropriate to reproduce the contents of the compliance report submitted by Executive Engineer (Dev.), PHED, Kamber-Shahdadkot, which reads as under: “With reference to CP referred above, and directions received from the Honourable Court, it is respectfully submitted that the work for providing water supply facility through RO plant in village Junani Taluka Warah, is in completion phase. Maximum (90%) physical progress has been achieved (photograph attached). It is assured to the Honourable Court that RO Plant will be made functional within two days by now. It has caused delay due to number of components involved such as civil work for pump house, boring, laying pipeline, installation of solar plant and purchase of pumping machinery and its assembling. Public Health Engineering Department team is closely monitoring the progress of work for its timely completion. During this period maximum coordination has been witnesses from Deputy Commissioner, Kamber.” Accordingly and in view of above, instant petition is hereby disposed of. However, the Executive Engineer (Dev.) PHED, Kamber- Shahdadkot at Kamber undertakes that after completion of the work, project will be handed over to their Operation and Maintenance Wing for future maintenance. Order accordingly. Judge Judge Manzoor
